parameters.name: type
parameters.label: Type
parameters.description: Provides two options for output geometry:

parameters.name: generations
parameters.label: Generations
parameters.description: Determines the number of times to apply the rules to the initial string. This value controls the growth of the L-system. Place a time-based function here to animate the L-system growth.

parameters.name: randscale
parameters.label: Random Scale
parameters.description: Random Scale as a percentage. This will apply a random scale to the changing geometry's lengths, angles and thickness.

parameters.name: randseed
parameters.label: Random Seed
parameters.description: Random Seed for the . This value can be used to select different sequences of random values.

parameters.name: contangl
parameters.label: Continuous Angles
parameters.description: Calculates the incremental angles of branches, if a non-integer generational value is used. If the Generations field is animating, this should be set to ensure smooth growth.

parameters.name: contlength
parameters.label: Continuous Length
parameters.description: Calculates the incremental lengths of the geometry points if a non-integer generational value is used. As with Continuous Angles, if the Generations field is animating, this should be set to ensure sm

parameters.name: contwidth
parameters.label: Continuous Width
parameters.description: Calculates the incremental lengths of the geometry points if a non-integer generational value is used. As with Continuous Angles, if the Generations field is animating, this should be set to ensure sm

parameters.name: docolor
parameters.label: Apply Color
parameters.description: Use a to apply color to the L-system as it grows.

parameters.name: colormap
parameters.label: Image File
parameters.description: Defines a to use when the Apply Color button is selected. Also see the ` and # turtle operators.

parameters.name: pointwidth
parameters.label: Point Width Attribute
parameters.description: Adds a point attribute to each point in the geometry. This width is effected by the Thickness and Thickness Scale parameters on the Tube Page.

parameters.name: rows
parameters.label: Rows
parameters.description: The first option sets the number of tube sides and the second sets the number of divisions per step length if tube geometry is selected.

parameters.name: cols
parameters.label: Columns
parameters.description: The first option sets the number of tube sides and the second sets the number of divisions per step length if tube geometry is selected.

parameters.name: tension
parameters.label: Tension
parameters.description: Tension defines the smoothness of branching corners.

parameters.name: smooth
parameters.label: Branch Blend
parameters.description: Enabling this option allows a child branch to be continuously joined to its parent branch.

parameters.name: thickinit
parameters.label: Thickness
parameters.description: This number defines the default tube thickness.

parameters.name: thickscale
parameters.label: Thickness Scale
parameters.description: This number is the scale factor used with the ! or ? operator.

parameters.name: dotexture
parameters.label: Apply Tube Texture Coordinates
parameters.description: When enabled, UV texture coordinates are applied to the tube segments, such that the texture wraps smoothly and continuously over branches.

parameters.name: vertinc
parameters.label: Vertical Increment
parameters.description: Defines the vertical spacing of texture coordinates over tube geometry when tube texture is applied.

parameters.name: stepinit
parameters.label: Step Size
parameters.description: Step Size allows you to define the default length of the edges when new geometry is generated.

parameters.name: stepscale
parameters.label: Step Size Scale
parameters.description: Step Size Scale defines the scale by which the geometry will be modified by the " or _ (double quote, or underscore) turtle operators.

parameters.name: angleinit
parameters.label: Angle
parameters.description: Angle defines the default turning angle for turns, rolls and pitches.

parameters.name: anglescale
parameters.label: Angle Scale
parameters.description: Angle Scale allows you to enter the scaling factor to be employed when the ; or @ operators are used.

parameters.name: varb
parameters.label: Variable b
parameters.description: Substitutes user-defined b, c and d variables in rules or premise. These variables are expanded and so may include system variables such as and .

parameters.name: varc
parameters.label: Variable c
parameters.description: Substitutes user-defined b, c and d variables in rules or premise. These variables are expanded and so may include system variables such as and .

parameters.name: vard
parameters.label: Variable d
parameters.description: Substitutes user-defined b, c and d variables in rules or premise. These variables are expanded and so may include system variables such as and .

parameters.name: gravity
parameters.label: Gravity
parameters.description: This parameter determines the amount of gravity applied to the geometry via the T (tropism vector) turtle operator. is when a plant bends or curves in response to an external stimulus. L-systems emplo

parameters.name: pictop
parameters.label: Pic Image TOP
parameters.description: This is the which the pic() function uses. See below.

parameters.name: grpprefix
parameters.label: Group Prefix
parameters.description: If the production g(n) is encountered, all subsequent geometry is included in a primitive group prefixed with this label and ending with the ascii value of n. See below for an example.

parameters.name: chanprefix
parameters.label: Channel Prefix
parameters.description: If the expression chan(n) is encountered, it is replaced with the local channel prefixed with this label and ending with the ascii value of n.

parameters.name: stampa
parameters.label: Leaf Param A
parameters.description: You can determine which parameters are used by leaves. See below for an example.

parameters.name: stampb
parameters.label: Leaf Param B
parameters.description: You can determine which parameters are used by leaves. See below for an example.

parameters.name: stampc
parameters.label: Leaf Param C
parameters.description: You can determine which parameters are used by leaves. See below for an example.

parameters.name: rules
parameters.label: Rules DAT
parameters.description: to the defining the rules for the LSystem.

parameters.name: incv
parameters.label: Incv
parameters.description: Defines the default color U, V index increments when the turtle symbols ` or # are used.
